ocr_findings.description: Image has ruby annotation 「いぶか」 above 「訝」; OCR renders 「詳しがる」 instead of 「訝しがる」 — semantically identical character pair, cosmetic difference in how OCR handled the ruby text

reviewer_notes: Preface/foreword page (はじめに). All body text faithfully reproduced. The ruby annotation on 訝 is represented as 詳 in OCR — a kanji shape-proximity substitution — but does not materially affect meaning. Page number 'iv' captured correctly at bottom.
